description: All-time and current passenger-car presence for a brand LIKE pattern. Use when user asks how many [brand] cars ever appeared in Denmark vs current survivors. Current-only: dmr-car-brand-count.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | WHERE KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword LIKE ?brand_pattern | STATS all_time_car_count = COUNT(*), currently_registered_car_count = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret", first_registration_year = MIN(_foerste_registrering_aar), latest_registration_year = MAX(_foerste_registrering_aar) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | SORT all_time_car_count DESC | LIMIT 20

brand_pattern.description: ES|QL LIKE pattern for the brand name. Use the likely canonical brand name or a wildcard form when needed, for example LADA, *LADA*, Mercedes*, or *Mercedes*.
